patterns: 4 paths to wealth: save, earn more, invest, build business
Equity > Income: own assets, don't just earn salary
Skills > Credentials: learn to sell, market, negotiate
Leverage: use other people's money, time, or knowledge
Compound Effect: small gains compounded over time
Focus on one thing: master one path before diversifying

frameworks.name: Wealth Pyramid
frameworks.description: Base: Save money. Middle: Increase income + invest. Top: Build/buy businesses.

frameworks.name: Hormozi Wealth Principles
frameworks.description: Equity > Income, Skills > Credentials, Leverage, Compound Effect, Focus

examples.title: If You Want To Create Wealth In 2026, Watch This (4 Paths)
examples.author: Alex Hormozi
examples.preview: Alex Hormozi breaks down the 4 paths to wealth creation: save money, make more money, invest money, and build a business. Emphasizes equity over income, skills over credentials, and the power of leverage and compound effect.
